⚡

Welcome to Blink

Let's get you set up for instant video calling!

🎉 Welcome to Blink!

Blink makes video calling as simple as pressing a hotkey. No accounts, no hassle - just instant connections.

  • Press a hotkey to instantly start a call
  • Share simple codes with your contacts
  • Private calls - only people with your code can join
  • Works with anyone who has Blink

Let's set up your first call target!

👤 Create Your First Target

A "target" is someone you want to call. Let's create your first one!

We'll generate a unique code for this target that you can share with them.

🔗 Share Your Code

Here's your unique code for :

Click to copy code

Share this code with your contact so they can add you as a target too!

💡 Tip: Both people need to have each other's codes to call each other.

⌨️ Set Your Hotkey

Choose a hotkey combination to instantly call :

Your hotkey will be:

Cmd+Shift+J

Press this combination anytime to instantly start a call!

💡 You can change this later in Settings → Hotkeys

🎉

All Set!

Blink is now configured and ready to use!

Quick Summary:

  • Target:
  • Your Code:
  • Hotkey:

What's next?

  • Share your code with your contact
  • Ask them to add you as a target in their Blink app
  • Press your hotkey to start calling!
  • Right-click the tray icon to access settings
